basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT Gandhinagar is recruiting for 1 Project Associate-I position on a temporary basis.

qualification.details: Consolidated Monthly Remuneration: Rs. 45,000 to Rs. 70,000 per month (depending on qualification and experience of the candidate). House Rent Allowance: NA
qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, Electronics, IT or allied discipline with minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onwards and 55% or equivalent in Class 10th & 12th.
qualification.experience: • Experience in Computer Science or Computer Systems pedagogical research • Experience in creating and disseminating pedagogical videos • Experience in creating pedagogical tools for computer systems • Experience in creating and distributing pedagogical software (e.g., via GitHub) • Hands-on experience with breadboards, discrete ICs for courses like digital systems, computer architecture, operating systems, etc.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates can apply online through the official application portal.
Candidates must submit their application on or before 08th July 2026.
important_instructions: This is a temporary contractual position for 1 year. Remuneration will be decided based on the candidate’s qualification and experience. Only candidates who have completed the essential qualifying degree and possess the final marksheet are eligible. For any queries, contact: Prof Manish Jain at [email protected]

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application submission is 08th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Associate-I at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 45,000 to Rs. 70,000 per month depending on qualification and experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate-I?
faq.answer: Candidates must have B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science, Electronics, IT or allied branches with minimum 60% marks from graduation and 55% in 10th & 12th.

faq.question: Q4. What is the duration of the Project Associate position at IIT Gandhinagar?
faq.answer: The appointment is for 1 Year on a temporary basis.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Apply online through the link: http://recruitment.iitgn.ac.in/projectstaff/ before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What are the desirable skills for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate?
faq.answer: Experience in pedagogical research, creating educational videos, pedagogical tools/software, and hands-on work with breadboards & ICs for computer systems courses.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: No age limit is applicable for this position.

faq.question: Q8. Who is the Principal Investigator for this IIT Gandhinagar project?
faq.answer: Prof Manish Jain, Center for Creative Learning.

faq.question: Q9. Is prior experience mandatory for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, candidates with relevant pedagogical research, video creation, and hardware experience will be strongly preferred.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Gandhinagar Project Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: Refer to Advertisement No. OTH/13470/Advt0245 dated 01.07.2026 available on the IIT Gandhinagar website.
